name: ctyun-security-guard
description: OctoBus package for CTYun Server Security Guard native edition read-only query APIs.

CTYun_SecurityGuard.CTYun_SecurityGuard/.name: untreated-risk
CTYun_SecurityGuard.CTYun_SecurityGuard/.description: Query CTYun Server Security Guard untreated risk statistics.

CTYun_SecurityGuard.CTYun_SecurityGuard/.name: get-host-status
CTYun_SecurityGuard.CTYun_SecurityGuard/.description: Query CTYun Server Security Guard agent protection status statistics.

CTYun_SecurityGuard.CTYun_SecurityGuard/.name: host-list
CTYun_SecurityGuard.CTYun_SecurityGuard/.description: Query CTYun Server Security Guard server list.

CTYun_SecurityGuard.CTYun_SecurityGuard/.name: get-vulnerability-list
CTYun_SecurityGuard.CTYun_SecurityGuard/.description: Query CTYun Server Security Guard vulnerability announcement list.

CTYun_SecurityGuard.CTYun_SecurityGuard/.name: v1instrusioneventlist
CTYun_SecurityGuard.CTYun_SecurityGuard/.description: Query CTYun Server Security Guard intrusion alarm list.

CTYun_SecurityGuard.CTYun_SecurityGuard/.name: get-virus-by-page
CTYun_SecurityGuard.CTYun_SecurityGuard/.description: Query CTYun Server Security Guard virus event list.

CTYun_SecurityGuard.CTYun_SecurityGuard/.name: invoke-read-only-api
CTYun_SecurityGuard.CTYun_SecurityGuard/.description: Invoke a built-in CTYun Server Security Guard read-only API.
